title: Alakaroud/vuln-structure
summary: 🔍 Extract and structure security vulnerability data from unstructured text with ease using the lightweight Python package, vuln-structure.

title: nishantsunuwar/MoCE
summary: 🌟 Implement Mixture-of-Clustered-Experts (MoCE) to improve expert specialization and generalization in instruction tuning with advanced routing mechanisms.

title: judy-kyalo/llm-structured-summary
summary: 📝 Summarize text using LLMs to generate structured insights from research titles or abstracts, making data easy to understand and reuse.

title: rduffyuk/querymind
summary: 🧠 Intelligent RAG with smart query routing - Choose the right search strategy automatically (FastSearch <1s, DeepResearch ~10s, WebSearch 2-5s)

title: kacchanff/agent-playground
summary: 🛠️ Experiment with AI agents in a local sandbox to run, score, and compare outputs without the need for complex frameworks.

title: AlexanderPolozhnov/careerpilot-ai
summary: CareerPilot AI — полномасштабная платформа управления поиском работы с анализом вакансий с помощью искусственного интеллекта, отслеживанием приложений, напоминаниями и аналитикой. Статус: В активном развитии.

title: Aqta-ai/bounds
summary: PDF redaction that runs entirely in your browser. Five detection layers including Gemma 4 contextual PHI. No uploads, no servers, no leaks.

title: ashokramcse/olla-nest
summary: Company ready local AI workspace built on Ollama Auto Router, admin controls, RBAC, audit trail, reports & analytics. Self-hosted, no cloud, no data leaves your network.

title: gskrishna3838/Whisperer-on-Wirst
summary: 🤖 Create your private AI companion on your wrist for local, emotionally aware assistance with no internet required. Customize and hack it to suit your needs.

title: HontoUKI/Maria-AI-Character-Engine
summary: Local AI character engine with memory, personality, emotional state and LLM integration.

title: VyomKulshrestha/Heliox-OS
summary: An open-source, privacy-first AI System Control Agent (JARVIS-like) using voice and hand gestures

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy. (Mac & Windows)

title: Payton2cool4/LLMs-local
summary: 🚀 Explore tools and resources to run large language models locally, enhancing efficiency and control over your AI applications.

title: reaatech/llm-router
summary: Cost/latency/judgment-based model router — pluggable routing strategies, fallback chains, per-model cost telemetry, OTel spans, eval hooks. Ships a sample config for the frontier-judge + code-workhorse + local-inference pattern.

title: zkzkGamal/zkzkAgent
summary: zkzkAgent is a powerful, privacy-focused local AI assistant designed to act as your intelligent system manager on Linux. Built on LangGraph and Ollama, it automates complex workflows, manages system processes, handles network tasks, and provides voice interaction capabilities—all while keeping your data on your machine.

title: prady4the4bady/prady-os
summary: Prady OS v1.0.0 — A Buildroot Linux distro with Prax, a 44-service local-first AI stack. Autonomous agent OS built by Pradyun, Dubai, UAE.

title: redblac/web-youtube-summarizer-llm
summary: 📝 Summarize any YouTube video or website URL effortlessly using LangChain and Groq Llama models for clear, concise insights.

title: marcossangomes/SmartLLM-Router
summary: 🔍 Optimize LLM requests by routing them to the best models, while leveraging semantic caching and real-time cost analytics for efficient resource use.
